_doc.purpose: Book NSpace mapping table — IRS form fid → Balance-Sheet Acct UAS path.
_doc.format: [ 'F###', '<Acct UAS>' ]   3-digit zero-padded fid; UAS is either a single COA acct (e.g. 'Acct.Equity.Owner.Capital.Funds') or a stmtBalanceSheet taxAggregate name prefixed 'BS.' (e.g. 'BS.total_assets').
_doc.scope: Only fields sourced from the Balance Sheet appear here.  Profile-sourced and Income-Statement-sourced fields live in bookNS_Profile.json / bookNS_IS.json.  A single Acct may appear under multiple fids (e.g. BS.total_assets → F016, F371, F373).  Begin/End-of-year columns currently resolve to the same end-of-period BS snapshot; prior-year carry will be added when a prior-period BS becomes available.
_doc.resolver: irsForm.savePDF() resolves each entry as follows:  acct startswith 'Acct.' → stmtBalanceSheet row Balance for that COA acct;  acct startswith 'BS.'   → stmtBalanceSheet.taxAggregates()[name];  acct startswith 'Profile.' → stmtProfile cell;  acct startswith 'IS.'   → stmtIncomeStmt.taxAggregates()[name].
_doc.perPartner: Sch_K1 entries reference partnership-level totals.  irsForm.savePDF() multiplies them by partner.pct from llcOwners when emitting per-partner FILL pdfs (capital section Item L).
